title: Mob Grinding Utils: Vanillafied (16px)
description: Complete, handcrafted rework of Mob Grinding Utils mod textures
body:
Complete, handcrafted 16px retexture of [Mob Grinding Utils](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mob-grinding-utils) mod: now it seamlessly integrates into Minecraft world.

![Animated Blocks](https://i.imgur.com/2xZlfeX.gif)

Main goal of "Mob Grinding Utils: Vanillafied" resource pack is to stay as close as possible to the original concept, while following Minecraft's design principles.

## Items

![Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jcSuF0PJ/images/06d8f67389f37fc075f98f2614f53230a61d9908.png)

## Blocks, Tile Entities, Fluid (animated)

![Tanks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jcSuF0PJ/images/8f1f77bcf7cbd7cc2301201685331f0d57b74290.png)
![Other Blocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jcSuF0PJ/images/232bdef95cf4ad470eadb3c70aa2dcb4f34883e4.png)

## GUI

![GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/jcSuF0PJ/images/03ea7d168f6a227d7c1f13097d11edc74a256933.png)

## Sounds

- Replaced "Happy Birthday" sound with egg laying "pop" sound.
- Replaced "boink" sound with a subtle slime jump sound.
- Other sounds are called from the code and cannot be replaced or disabled.

## Legal

- You cannot redistribute this resource pack.
- You can include this resource pack in a modpack.
- You cannot use any data from this resource pack in other projects without explicit permission.
